name: Ricotta Fruit Dip
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Vanilla or peach yogurt, low-fat
2 cups Strawberries, or melon balls and/or other fruit
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender container or food processor bowl, combine the ricotta cheese, powdered sugar, orange juice, and vanilla.
2. Cover and blend or process until smooth.
3. Stir the mixture into the yogurt.
4. If desired, cover and chill for up to 24 hours.
5. Serve with berries, melon, and other fruit.
73 calories, 1 g total fat, 0 g saturated fat, 3 mg cholesterol, 27 mg sodium, 14 g carbohydrate, 1 g fiber, 4 g protein.
SOURCE: BH&G Quick, Healthy, and Delicious Cooking (pg. 209)
